scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @sharnam/api" "npm run dev -w @sharnam/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sharnam/shared && npm run build -w @sharnam/api && npm run build -w @sharnam/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
